4270 using ValueType = std::iter_value_t<Derived>;
4271 using KeyType = std::decay_t<std::invoke_result_t<KeyFunc, ValueType>>;
4272 std::unordered_map<KeyType, std::vector<ValueType>> groups;
4273
4274 for (auto&& value : GetDerived()) {
4275 KeyType key;
4276 if constexpr (std::invocable<KeyFunc, decltype(value)>) {
4277 key = key_func(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4278 } else {
4279 key = std::apply(key_func, std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4280 }
4281 groups[std::move(key)].push_back(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4282 }
4283
4284 return groups;
4285}
4286
4287template <typename Derived>
4288template <typename KeyFunc, typename MapAllocator, typename ValueAllocator>
4289constexpr auto FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::GroupByWith(
4290 const KeyFunc& key_func, MapAllocator map_allocator,
4291 ValueAllocator value_allocator) const {
4292 using ValueType = std::iter_value_t<Derived>;
4293 using KeyType =
4294 std::decay_t<details::call_or_apply_result_t<const KeyFunc&, ValueType>>;
4295 using GroupVector = std::vector<ValueType, ValueAllocator>;
4296 using MapValueType = std::pair<const KeyType, GroupVector>;
4297 static_assert(std::same_as<typename MapAllocator::value_type, MapValueType>,
4298 "Map allocator value_type must match map value type");
4299 static_assert(std::same_as<typename ValueAllocator::value_type, ValueType>,
4300 "Value allocator value_type must match grouped element type");
4301
4302 std::unordered_map<KeyType, GroupVector, std::hash<KeyType>, std::equal_to<>,
4303 MapAllocator>
4304 groups(0, std::hash<KeyType>{}, std::equal_to<>{},
4305 std::move(map_allocator));
4306
4307 for (auto&& value : GetDerived()) {
4308 KeyType key;
4309 if constexpr (std::invocable<KeyFunc, decltype(value)>) {
4310 key = key_func(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4311 } else {
4312 key = std::apply(key_func, std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4313 }
4314
4315 auto [iter, inserted] = groups.try_emplace(std::move(key));
4316 if (inserted) {
4317 iter->second = GroupVector(value_allocator);
4318 }
4319 iter->second.push_back(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4320 }
4321
4322 return groups;
4323}
4324
4325template <typename Derived>
4326constexpr auto FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::Collect() const {
4327 using ValueType = std::iter_value_t<Derived>;
4328 std::vector<ValueType> result;
4329 result.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(
4330 std::distance(GetDerived().begin(), GetDerived().end())));
4331 for (auto&& value : GetDerived()) {
4332 result.push_back(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4333 }
4334 return result;
4335}
4336
4337template <typename Derived>
4338template <typename Allocator>
4339constexpr auto FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::CollectWith(
4340 Allocator allocator) const {
4341 using ValueType = std::iter_value_t<Derived>;
4342 std::vector<ValueType, Allocator> result{std::move(allocator)};
4343 result.reserve(static_cast<size_t>(
4344 std::distance(GetDerived().begin(), GetDerived().end())));
4345 for (auto&& value : GetDerived()) {
4346 result.push_back(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4347 }
4348 return result;
4349}
4350
4351template <typename Derived>
4352constexpr auto FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::CollectWith(
4353 std::pmr::memory_resource* resource) const {
4354 using ValueType = std::iter_value_t<Derived>;
4355 return CollectWith(std::pmr::polymorphic_allocator<ValueType>{resource});
4356}
4357
4358template <typename Derived>
4359template <typename OutIt>
4360constexpr void FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::Into(OutIt out) const {
4361 for (auto&& value : GetDerived()) {
4362 *out++ = std::forward<decltype(value)>(value);
4363 }
4364}
4365
4366template <typename Derived>
4367template <typename Pred>
4368constexpr bool FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::Any(
4369 const Pred& predicate) const {
4370 for (const auto& value : GetDerived()) {
4371 bool result = false;
4372 if constexpr (std::invocable<Pred, decltype(value)>) {
4373 result = predicate(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4374 } else {
4375 result = std::apply(predicate, std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4376 }
4377 if (result) {
4378 return true;
4379 }
4380 }
4381 return false;
4382}
4383
4384template <typename Derived>
4385template <typename Pred>
4386constexpr bool FunctionalAdapterBase<Derived>::All(
4387 const Pred& predicate) const {
4388 for (const auto& value : GetDerived()) {
4389 bool result = false;
4390 if constexpr (std::invocable<Pred, decltype(value)>) {
4391 result = predicate(std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4392 } else {
4393 result = std::apply(predicate, std::forward<decltype(value)>(value));
4394 }
4395 if (!result) {
4396 return false;
4397 }
4398 }
4399 return true;
4400}
4401
4402} // namespace helios::utils
helios::utils::ChainAdapter
Iterator adapter that chains two sequences together.
Definition functional_adapters.hpp:2052
helios::utils::ChainAdapter::end
constexpr ChainAdapter end() const noexcept(std::is_nothrow_copy_constructible_v< ChainAdapter > &&std::is_nothrow_copy_constructible_v< Iter1 > &&std::is_nothrow_copy_constructible_v< Iter2 >)
Definition functional_adapters.hpp:2267
helios::utils::ChainAdapter::iterator_concept
std::conditional_t< details::IterYieldsReference< Iter1 > && details::IterYieldsReference< Iter2 >, std::forward_iterator_tag, std::input_iterator_tag > iterator_concept
Definition functional_adapters.hpp:2054
